flagged_setups.thesis: Post-earnings momentum: Q2 EPS $2.01 beat ($1.95 est), Rev $111.18B record, iPhone $57B +22%, Services $30.98B record. CEO transition (Ternus) narrative to play out. AI-lite model confirmed as winning capex discipline trade.
flagged_setups.price_note: ~$279 AH (+3% from $271.35 close Apr 30) · Apple IR Apr 30 / Yahoo Finance

flagged_setups.thesis: Pre-earnings setup: EPS est $0.28 (+115% YoY), Rev est $1.54B (+74% YoY). AIG contract pipeline and commercial AIP adoption rate are key data points. Q4 2025 beat. FY26 guide $7.18-7.20B implies 61% growth.

Pre-earnings setup: Rev guide $9.8B (+32% YoY), non-GAAP gross margin ~55%. Instinct MI350 GPU record Q4 demand expected to continue. EPYC Genoa server share gains. CEO Su: 'year 2 of 10-year AI buildout.'
flagged_setups.price_note: $335.00 close Apr 30 · Yahoo Finance / AMD IR

narrative_threads: AI capex discipline wins: AAPL (+4.5% AH) and GOOGL (+10% wk) rewarded; META (-9%) and MSFT (-4%) punished — thesis from prior issue confirmed
Stagflation signal escalating: ISM Prices Paid 84.6% (+6.3pp) follows PCE +4.5% — no policy cover for easing
Warsh Fed transition: takes over May 15; four FOMC dissenters; market fully prices out 2026 cuts
Iran war de-escalation in progress but stalled: Brent $126→$108 on peace signal; Trump rejects deal without nuclear provisions; Hormuz closed
AI infrastructure fragmentation: OpenAI market share 80%→64.5%; NVDA TAM compression from hyperscaler in-house chips (AWS Trainium, Google TPUs); AMD/PLTR as the plays
